fa-circle-a.intentId: navigate to or identify an A-labeled section or category; represent the first alphabetical option

fa-circle-ampersand.appearanceId: circle containing an ampersand symbol; round outline enclosing a stylized and-sign glyph
fa-circle-ampersand.functionalityId: represents a conjunction or combination action; links or joins two items or categories together
fa-circle-ampersand.intentId: indicate a relationship or pairing between two elements; represent a combined or joint grouping

fa-circle-arrow-down-left.appearanceId: arrow pointing diagonally toward the lower-left inside a circle outline; circular border enclosing a down-left diagonal arrowhead
fa-circle-arrow-down-left.functionalityId: moves or sends content diagonally down and to the left; navigates to the lower-left direction
fa-circle-arrow-down-left.intentId: reposition or route content toward the lower-left; indicate movement or flow in a down-left direction

fa-circle-arrow-down-right.appearanceId: arrow pointing diagonally toward the lower-right inside a circle outline; circular border enclosing a down-right diagonal arrowhead
fa-circle-arrow-down-right.functionalityId: moves or sends content diagonally down and to the right; navigates to the lower-right direction
fa-circle-arrow-down-right.intentId: reposition or route content toward the lower-right; indicate movement or flow in a down-right direction

fa-circle-arrow-up-left.appearanceId: arrow pointing diagonally toward the upper-left inside a circle outline; circular border enclosing an up-left diagonal arrowhead
fa-circle-arrow-up-left.functionalityId: moves or sends content diagonally up and to the left; navigates to the upper-left direction
fa-circle-arrow-up-left.intentId: reposition or route content toward the upper-left; indicate movement or flow in an up-left direction

fa-circle-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: arrow pointing diagonally toward the upper-right inside a circle outline; circular border enclosing an up-right diagonal arrowhead
fa-circle-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: moves or sends content diagonally up and to the right; navigates to the upper-right direction
fa-circle-arrow-up-right.intentId: reposition or route content toward the upper-right; indicate movement or flow in an up-right direction

fa-circle-b.appearanceId: circle containing uppercase letter B; round outline enclosing a capital B glyph
fa-circle-b.functionalityId: selects or filters the second alphabetical category; labels content or a list entry under category B
fa-circle-b.intentId: navigate to or identify a B-labeled section or category; represent the second alphabetical option

fa-circle-bolt.appearanceId: circle containing a lightning bolt symbol; round outline enclosing a zigzag flash shape
fa-circle-bolt.functionalityId: triggers a quick action or power feature; activates an instant or high-energy operation
fa-circle-bolt.intentId: execute a fast or powerful action; access an electric or energy-related feature

fa-circle-c.appearanceId: circle containing uppercase letter C; round outline enclosing a capital C glyph
fa-circle-c.functionalityId: selects or filters the third alphabetical category; labels content or a list entry under category C

fa-circle-d.appearanceId: circle containing uppercase letter D; round outline enclosing a capital D glyph

fa-circle-d.intentId: navigate to or identify a D-labeled section or category; represent the fourth alphabetical option

fa-circle-dashed.appearanceId: circle formed by a series of dashes or short segments with gaps between them; incomplete ring made of evenly spaced broken line segments
fa-circle-dashed.functionalityId: indicates a pending, draft, or incomplete state; marks a placeholder or in-progress circular element
fa-circle-dashed.intentId: represent an item that is incomplete or not yet finalized; signal a placeholder or draft status

fa-circle-divide.appearanceId: circle containing a division sign with a dot above and a dot below a horizontal line; round outline enclosing an obelus or divide symbol
fa-circle-divide.functionalityId: performs or triggers a division calculation; opens a math or arithmetic operation for dividing values
fa-circle-divide.intentId: divide a value or quantity by another; access a division function in a calculator or math tool

fa-circle-dot.appearanceId: circle outline with a smaller filled dot centered inside it; ring shape enclosing a solid central point
fa-circle-dot.functionalityId: selects a radio button option; marks the currently active or chosen item in a list
fa-circle-dot.intentId: choose a single option from a set of mutually exclusive choices; indicate the selected state of a radio control

fa-circle-down.appearanceId: circle outline containing a downward-pointing arrow centered inside; round border enclosing a downward arrowhead
fa-circle-down.functionalityId: downloads content or scrolls the view downward; moves focus or selection to the next item below
fa-circle-down.intentId: retrieve or download a file or data item; navigate downward through a list or page

fa-circle-down-left.appearanceId: circle outline with a downward-left diagonal arrow inside; round border enclosing an arrow pointing toward the lower-left corner
fa-circle-down-left.functionalityId: moves or collapses content toward the lower-left; navigates diagonally down and left within a view
fa-circle-down-left.intentId: shift focus or content toward the lower-left of a layout; indicate a down-left directional movement

fa-circle-down-right.appearanceId: circle outline with a downward-right diagonal arrow inside; round border enclosing an arrow pointing toward the lower-right corner
fa-circle-down-right.functionalityId: moves or expands content toward the lower-right; navigates diagonally down and right within a view
fa-circle-down-right.intentId: shift focus or content toward the lower-right of a layout; indicate a down-right directional movement

fa-circle-e.appearanceId: circle containing uppercase letter E; round outline enclosing a capital E glyph
fa-circle-e.functionalityId: selects or filters the fifth alphabetical category; labels content or a list entry under category E
fa-circle-e.intentId: navigate to or identify an E-labeled section or category; represent the fifth alphabetical option

fa-circle-ellipsis.appearanceId: circle containing three horizontally arranged dots; round outline enclosing a horizontal ellipsis symbol
fa-circle-ellipsis.functionalityId: opens an overflow menu with additional options; reveals more actions in a contextual dropdown
fa-circle-ellipsis.intentId: access additional or hidden menu options; expand a set of actions beyond what is immediately visible

fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.appearanceId: circle containing three vertically stacked dots; round outline enclosing a vertical ellipsis symbol
fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.functionalityId: opens a vertical overflow menu with more options; reveals a context menu of additional actions
fa-circle-ellipsis-vertical.intentId: access a vertical list of additional actions or settings; expand a contextual menu for more choices

fa-circle-envelope.appearanceId: circle outline containing a small envelope or letter shape; round border enclosing a rectangular mail flap symbol
fa-circle-envelope.functionalityId: opens an email compose or inbox view; sends or accesses a message via a circular mail button
fa-circle-envelope.intentId: send or read an email message; access a messaging or mail feature

fa-circle-euro.appearanceId: circle containing a euro currency sign with two horizontal bars through the C-shaped glyph; round outline enclosing a euro symbol
fa-circle-euro.functionalityId: selects euro as the currency for a transaction; opens a euro-denominated payment or pricing setting
fa-circle-euro.intentId: set or view a price or amount in euros; access euro currency options in a financial tool

fa-circle-exclamation.appearanceId: circle containing an exclamation mark with a vertical stroke and a dot below; round outline enclosing a warning punctuation symbol
fa-circle-exclamation.functionalityId: alerts the user to an error, warning, or important notice; highlights a critical status that needs attention
fa-circle-exclamation.intentId: address an urgent warning or error condition; review an alert or important notification

fa-circle-exclamation-check.appearanceId: circle containing both an exclamation mark and a small checkmark; round outline enclosing a combined warning and verified symbol
fa-circle-exclamation-check.functionalityId: confirms that a warning or alert has been acknowledged; marks an issue as reviewed and resolved
fa-circle-exclamation-check.intentId: acknowledge and clear an alert or warning; confirm that a flagged issue has been addressed

fa-circle-f.intentId: navigate to or identify an F-labeled section or category; represent the sixth alphabetical option

fa-circle-gf.intentId: access or represent a resource or brand identified by the GF initials; navigate to a GF-labeled section

fa-circle-h.appearanceId: circle containing uppercase letter H; round outline enclosing a capital H glyph

fa-circle-h.intentId: find a hospital or medical facility; access help or a helipad-marked location

fa-circle-half.functionalityId: toggles between two opposite states or modes; switches a setting to a half-on or partial state

fa-circle-k.functionalityId: selects or filters a K-labeled category or item; labels content or a list entry under category K

fa-circle-l.functionalityId: selects or filters an L-labeled category or item; labels content or a list entry under category L
fa-circle-l.intentId: navigate to or identify an L-labeled section or category; represent an L-keyed option or group

fa-circle-left.appearanceId: circle outline containing a leftward-pointing arrow centered inside; round border enclosing a left arrowhead
fa-circle-left.functionalityId: navigates to the previous page or item; moves focus or content to the left

fa-circle-m.functionalityId: selects or filters an M-labeled category or item; labels content or a list entry under category M
fa-circle-m.intentId: navigate to or identify an M-labeled section or category; represent an M-keyed option or group
